titles.en: Enduring like free people or remaining silent like the ignorant
Enduring like free people or remaining silent like the ignorant

segments: ٤١٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنْ صَبَرَ صَبْرَ الْأَحْرَارِ، وَإِلَّا سَلاَ سُلُوَّ الْأَغْمَارِ.
arabic.text: ٤١٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنْ صَبَرَ صَبْرَ الْأَحْرَارِ، وَإِلَّا سَلاَ سُلُوَّ الْأَغْمَارِ.

segments: 413. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: One should endure like free people, otherwise one should keep quite like the ignorant.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 413. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: One should endure like free people, otherwise one should keep quite like the ignorant.
